title: Licaria endlicheriifolia
taxonomy: Licaria endlicheriifolia is a species of plant in the family Calycanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Licaria, which is a group of flowering plants native to Central and South America. Within the Calycanthaceae family, Licaria endlicheriifolia is classified as a type of evergreen tree or shrub. The exact classification of Licaria endlicheriifolia may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic updates. Further research is needed to confirm its classification within the plant kingdom.
